same_norm_different_meaning.annotation:
IT IS OBLIGATORY
FOR the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer
TO comply with any request under subsection (2)
same_norm_different_meaning.groundtruth:
IT IS PERMITTED
FOR a court
TO order any individual falling within subsection (3) to take such steps as may be specified in the order with a view to enabling the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer to comply with the court's request under subsection (2).

same_norm_different_meaning.annotation:
IT IS OBLIGATORY
FOR the court
TO specify the period for which the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer is to monitor compliance with the order
WHEN/IF/WHERE making a request under subsection (2) [source: https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/1989/41/section/11H]
same_norm_different_meaning.groundtruth:
IT IS PROHIBITED
FOR a court
TO make an order under subsection (8) with respect to an individual who is a child
UNLESS he is a parent of the child with respect to whom the order falling within subsection (1) was made. [source: https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/1989/41/section/11H]

only_in_annotations.annotation:
IT IS PERMITTED
FOR the court
TO ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to monitor compliance
WHEN/IF/WHERE the court makes a child arrangements order containing provision of a kind mentioned in section 11C(1)(a)(i), (ii) or (iii), or an order varying a child arrangements order [source: https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/1989/41/section/11H]

IT IS PROHIBITED
FOR the court
TO make an order under subsection (8) with respect to an individual who is a child
UNLESS he is a parent of the child with respect to whom the order falling within subsection (1) was made [source: https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/1989/41/section/11H]

only_in_groundtruth.groundtruth:
IT IS PROHIBITED
FOR a court
TO make a request under subsection (2) in relation to a child arrangements order that is an excepted order (within the meaning given by section 11B(4)).
